summary: KOLO CRM testing completed. Backend APIs 100% pass (22/22 tests). Frontend UI verified - Login, Tasks, Leads, Navigation all working. Key features: Task color coding (WHITE for future tasks visible), Prospect status confirmation dialog working correctly.

issues: Tasks show WHITE color for future tasks (Feb 17, 2026). Unable to visually verify RED (overdue) and ORANGE (today) colors due to no tasks with those dates in test data. Backend logic is correct per code review.

passed_tests: Backend: API root returns 'KOLO API v1.0.0'
Backend: Geo pricing returns correct USD/EUR/GBP based on country
Backend: Login with valid credentials (pressardelliot@gmail.com / Test123) succeeds
Backend: Login with invalid password returns 401
Backend: Get tasks today endpoint works
Backend: Get all tasks endpoint works
Backend: Create task with today/past/future dates works
Backend: Complete task marks it as completed
Backend: Today tasks excludes completed tasks
Backend: Get prospects list works
Backend: Create prospect works
Backend: Update prospect status to 'closed' works
Backend: Update prospect status to 'lost' works
Backend: Prospects list filters out closed/lost prospects
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Navigation between Today/Leads/Tasks tabs works
Frontend: Tasks tab displays tasks with color-coded borders
Frontend: Leads tab shows prospects with status badges
Frontend: Lead detail shows status change buttons
Frontend: CONFIRMATION DIALOG appears when changing status to Closed/Lost
Frontend: Confirmation dialog shows 'This lead will disappear from your active list'
critical_code_review_comments: Task color logic is correctly implemented in getTaskColor() function (lines 1095-1111): GREEN for completed, RED for overdue, ORANGE for today, WHITE for future
Prospect status confirmation dialog correctly implemented in ProspectDetail component (lines 494-539)
Closed/lost prospects are correctly filtered from the main list via backend API (line 1171)
Minor: Console warnings about hydration errors with <span> inside <option>/<select> - not blocking but should be addressed
seed_data_creation: Auto-generated follow-up tasks for prospects created via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core CRM features are working. Task color coding logic is implemented correctly in frontend (getTaskColor function). Prospect status confirmation dialog is working. The app uses session-based auth with cookies. To test task colors visually, create tasks with: today's date (ORANGE), past date (RED), future date (WHITE), then mark one as completed (GREEN).

verified_features.login: Email/password login with pressardelliot@gmail.com / Test123 works
verified_features.task_colors: Code review confirms: GREEN=completed, ORANGE=today, RED=overdue, WHITE=future
verified_features.task_completion_today_tab: Tasks completed from Today tab are removed from list (via setTasks filter)
verified_features.task_completion_tasks_tab: Tasks completed from Tasks tab show green color and strikethrough
verified_features.prospect_creation: Create prospect works with auto-generated follow-up task
verified_features.prospect_status_confirmation: Double confirmation dialog appears for 'Closed' and 'Lost' status changes
verified_features.prospect_disappears: Closed/lost prospects are filtered from main list via backend API filter
verified_features.navigation: Three tabs (Today, Leads, Tasks) navigation works correctly
